leads: A K-8 institution was facing enrollment crisis. Geographic perception had calcified into a liability. Operational costs were bleeding in places no one had quantified. We rebuilt the strategic narrative and the financial architecture underneath it.
highlights: Narrative repositioning reframing a geographic liability into a strategic asset
Financial architecture with enrollment-linked revenue modeling
Three-channel recovery strategy with conversion funnel optimization
Strategic partnership framework for institutional alliances
Operational excellence analysis quantifying $243K–$473K in annual hidden costs with vendor-specific recommendations and 2.2x–4.8x projected ROI
Systematic information requirements audit across three priority tiers
7-module architecture. Every module designed to function independently and compound collectively.
